cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal 9 damage to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: Avada Kedavra

cards.afterText: If you won, until the start of your next turn, any time your opponent would draw any number of cards, they must also take 1 damage. This effect does not stack with other copies of Crucio.
cards.title: Crucio

cards.afterText: Move the opposing fighter up to 4 spaces, including through spaces containing enemy fighters.
cards.title: Imperio

cards.duringText:
Add +2 to this card's value for each item that is true:
• You drew a card this turn.
• You are in more than 1 zone.
• Nagini is defeated.
cards.title: There Is Only Power

cards.afterText: Place this fighter in any empty space in their zone. If they were adjacent to a friendly fighter, you may also place the friendly fighter in an adjacent empty space.
cards.title: Dark Cloud Apparation

cards.afterText: The opposing fighter cannot leave their space for the rest of the turn unless moved by you.
cards.immediateText: You may swap spaces with a friendly fighter you control in your zone. That fighter is now the active fighter.
cards.title: Look At Me When I Kill You

cards.basicText: Choose a player. If that player did not attack Voldemort on their last turn, they must discard 1 card, then you may draw up to 2 cards.
cards.title: He Who Must Not Be Named

cards.basicText: You may draw up to 2 cards for each Regeneration card in your discard pile (including this one).
cards.title: Regeneration: Bone Of The Father

cards.basicText: Voldemort recovers 1 health for each Regeneration card in your discard pile (including this one).
cards.title: Regeneration: Flesh of the Servant

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent. They discard 1 random card for each Regeneration card in your discard pile (including this one).
cards.title: Regeneration: Blood Of The Enemy

cards.afterText: You may deal 2 damage to Voldemort. If you do, Nagini recovers 1 health.
cards.title: Only I Can Live... FOrever

cards.duringText: For each zone the opposing fighter is in, increase the value of this card by +1.
cards.title: Jaws of the Beast

cards.afterText: Deal the opposing fighter 1 damage for each copy of Venomous Bite in your discard pile (not including this one).
cards.title: Venomous Bite

hero.name: Voldemort
hero.specialAbility:
HORCRUX:
While Nagini is undefeated, if Voldemort's health would be reduced to zero, set it to 1 instead, then place Voldemort on or as close to his starting space as possible.
